sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/protocols']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 13:14 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''

status_in=prev.get('status','unknown')
created_files=[]
if status_in=='triad_present_protocol_next':
    # Create draft protocol from available real response previews; if previews are insufficient, mark needs review.
    proto=Path('governance/protocols/BEM852_AGREED_PROTOCOL_DRAFT.md')
    responses=prev.get('real_responses',[])
    content='# BEM-852 | Agreed Protocol Draft | '+created+sep+sep+'Source: real Claude response detected by smoke triad.'+sep+sep+'## Response evidence'+sep+json.dumps(responses,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)+sep+sep+'## Status'+sep+'Draft created from detected real response. Requires final formatting if operator requested table/docx.'+sep
    proto.write_text(content)
    created_files.append(str(proto))
    status='protocol_draft_created'
    next_action='format protocol into operator-readable final table'
elif status_in=='queue_pending_tick_next':
    status='tick_required'
    next_action='fresh tick to process existing queue'
elif status_in=='real_response_missing_queue_next':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem852_real_response_queue.json')

    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='real_response_queue_created'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response'
elif status_in=='runtime_missing_queue_next':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem852_runtime_queue.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v14','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-852 runtime queue from BEM-851','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='runtime_queue_created'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime'
elif status_in=='dispatch_result_missing_queue_next':
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem852_dispatch_result_queue.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v14','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-852 dispatch result queue from BEM-851','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='dispatch_result_queue_created'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify dispatch result'
else:
    status='unknown_state_reverify_needed'
    next_action='reverify triad and queue'
state={'bem':'BEM-852','status':status,'bem851_status':status_in,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem852_execute_bem851_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem852_execute_bem851_next.md').write_text('# BEM-852 | Execute BEM-851 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem852_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-852'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem852_execute_bem851_next.json','governance/reports/bem852_execute_bem851_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem852_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
